description: sweep thresholds over a ChangeNet inference CSV and pick the FAR @ 100%-recall operating point (read-only)
rules: prediction rule: score > threshold => NO_PASS; score <= threshold => PASS
ground-truth rule: any label other than the pass-label is treated as NO_PASS
FAR (False Alarm Rate) = FP / (FP + TN); all threshold candidates are evaluated on the whole dataset
stdlib-only metrics; plots are emitted only when matplotlib is installed (otherwise skipped, not fatal)
usage: Set INFER_CSV (path to the inference CSV with a label column and a score column) and RECORD_STORE. Optional: LABEL_COLUMN (default label), SCORE_COLUMN (default siamese_score), PASS_LABEL (default PASS), BINS (default 40). Writes ${RECORD_STORE}/kpi_analysis/{summary.txt, threshold_metrics.csv, best_f1_missed_no_pass_samples.csv} plus distribution/confusion plots.
limitation: Read-only analysis of one inference CSV; does not run inference, training, or any container. The score column must be numeric and the label column present, or the analysis falls back to a placeholder summary.
